isi.lyrics:
Lyric sus4 - Just Need You (feat.eira)

Romanization

I don’t need roses in a box,
or a ride with the top pulled off,
don’t need fancy things at all
just your hoodie when it rains to fall.
You make the small things feel so right,
midnight talks turn into sunlight,
you say my name and it feels brand new,
I don’t need the world, just you.
Don’t buy me pearls or Prada shoes,
I just want a heart that’s true.
Hold my hand, and say it slow,
you love me more than you can show.
Baby, I don’t need the view,
cause everything’s gold when I’m with you.
We can dance in socks on the floor,
laugh till our cheeks get sore,
don’t need the flash or the fame,
just whisper softly my name.
You turn my simple days to art,
with coffee breath and an open heart,
the world fades out in your arms tonight,
you and me that’s my spotlight.
They chase diamonds, I chase peace,
you’re my calm, my sweet release.
Forget the shows, forget the noise,
I just want your quiet voice.
So keep your love simple and true,
no filters, no games, just me and you.
Cause I don’t need all they do,
I just need you
